esqlQuery.esql:
// Alert when any Zabbix server cache exceeds 90% utilization.
// High cache usage can cause performance degradation and data loss.
// Adjust the threshold in the WHERE clause as needed.
FROM metrics-zabbix.server_health-*
| STATS config_cache = MAX(zabbix.server.cache.config.pused),
        value_cache = MAX(zabbix.server.cache.value.pused),
        history_cache = MAX(zabbix.server.cache.history.pused),
        trend_cache = MAX(zabbix.server.cache.trend.pused),
        index_cache = MAX(zabbix.server.cache.index.pused)
  BY host.name
| WHERE config_cache > 90 OR value_cache > 90 OR history_cache > 90 OR trend_cache > 90 OR index_cache > 90
